bone.$description: Bone — Page background and primary canvas — a warm off-white that reads as paper rather than screen, the defining surface of the entire system

ink.$description: Ink — Primary text, body copy, navigation, project metadata, 1px grid lines, image borders, and dark image treatments — the only non-canvas color

paper.$description: Paper — Card surfaces, image backgrounds, and reverse-text blocks — white inserts on the warm canvas to isolate portfolio pieces

grotesk.$description: Sole typeface across all UI — navigation, project metadata, and headlines. Used exclusively at weight 400 (no bold, no light), which is anti-convention for an agency portfolio; the regular weight whispers where competitors shout. Negative tracking tightens headlines at -0.02em while body sits at -0.005em, giving every line a printed-page density. The dlig feature enables discretionary ligatures for editorial flourish.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Full-bleed page background — the warm off-white that defines the paper-like quality

card.$description: Surface level 1: Reverse surfaces and image cards sitting on the canvas

inverted.$description: Surface level 2: Dark image treatments and high-contrast blocks within the grid
